'''''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 8: Splinter of the Mind's Eye''''' is the eighth of the ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|TPBs]], released on [[September 19]], [[2007]]. It is a hardcover version of [[Star Wars: Splinter of the Mind's Eye (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' trade paperback]].
